calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1466-1468 Page Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $1,200,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement.
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Advanced From Nov-09-11 To Oct-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Goule for Gail Bradley. Tom Latham for Peter and Erik de Steiguer. Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch.

Ms. Dolch will file her consent to serve as successor trustee. All parties agreed to waive bond. The Court granted the both petitions (subject to review of the orders).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement.
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Request To Shorten Time For Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement And On Amended Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-17-2011 Continued To Oct-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-13-2011 Continued To Aug-17-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
